posts.author: gidon (Gidon Sobel @Purple Plum Consulting - Certified monday.com partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Reminder about our upcoming webinar on Thursday 6/17!

Looking to digitize your real estate operations? Look no further than monday.com!
Click here to sign up: [Sign up]

This free webinar “Digitizing Real Estate Operations with monday.com ” is focused on helping both residential and commercial real estate companies just like yours.

  • Learn how to simplify your real estate processes and eliminate manual steps
  • Discover how to plan, organize, and track all of your transactions in one place
  • Simplify processes for listings, sales, rentals, property management and more
  • Hear from real estate leaders on how they unlocked value with monday.com
  • See a short demonstration of a monday.com real estate solution
  • Take advantage of great monday.com discounts!
